issue_title: [CVE-2026-27205] Flask 2.3.3 fails to set Vary: Cookie header on session access

structured_output.notes: Upgraded Flask 2.3.3 -> 3.1.3 (CVE-2026-27205), flask-babel 3.1.0 -> 4.0.0. Added _flask_compat.py shim for flask-sqlalchemy 2.5.x (blocked from 3.x by sqlalchemy<2 constraint). Fixed flask.escape -> markupsafe.escape in tests. All 35 CI checks pass.

issue_title: [CVE-2026-44405] Paramiko 3.5.1 allows SHA-1 in rsakey.py (no fix version yet)

structured_output.notes: Remediated CVE-2026-44405. Investigation: sshtunnel 0.4.0 builds its own paramiko.Transport internally and rejects unknown kwargs, so the tunnel connection cannot be configured to reject SHA-1 via that library. Where Superset controls the transport directly (host-key verification probe in superset/extensions/ssh.py), added a mitigation passing disabled_algorithms={'pubkeys': ['ssh-rsa']}, gated behind new config flag SSH_TUNNEL_REJECT_SHA1_KEYS (default True) with an escape hatch for legacy servers. Residual risk (sshtunnel-managed tunnel; no upstream paramiko fix) documented as accepted with re-check-on-next-release note in config.py, pyproject.toml, and UPDATING.md. 19 unit tests pass; ruff S,B clean on changed source. PR #10 opened (Closes #7) with CI passing (22 passed, 0 failed), then closed and branch deleted by repo owner chuangsta (not a CI failure or requested change).

issue_title: [Code Quality] Remove unused imports in superset/views/core.py

structured_output.notes: No F401 violations exist in superset/views/core.py. (exit 0), and independently with pyflakes 3.2.0 (no 'imported but unused' output). Repo ruff config enables F401 (not in ignore list, no per-file-ignore for this file). This is a false-positive automated issue: no unused imports to remove, so no diff and no PR. Awaiting user decision (close as false positive / leave / broaden scan).
